name: Provider audit request
about: Use after your benchmark run finishes and every test passes in the UI. See audit/README.md for setup.

labels: Provider Audit
assignees:
  - akash-network/codeowners-devops
---

## Before you submit

**Submit only after the harness run is complete and all tests are passing** (no failures in the web UI). If anything failed, fix it and redeploy before opening this issue.

You must **be in the Akash Discord** with the **Provider** role. Include your **Discord username** and **email** below (both required) so an auditor can verify you and reach you.

Read the **[Provider audit](https://github.com/akash-network/community/blob/main/audit/README.md)** guide for prerequisites (attributes, DNS, firewall, Discord), the SDL path, and how the benchmark UI works.

## Issue title

Use: **`[Provider Audit]: <provider hostname>`**  
Example: `[Provider Audit]: provider.example.com`

## Provider information

**Provider owner address (akash1…):**


**Provider domain:**


**HTTPS URL of the audit deployment** (ingress on port 80 — share the link auditors should open):


**Note:** Keep that deployment running until an auditor confirms they are done.

## Discord & email (required)

**Discord username** (as it appears in Akash Discord — confirm membership and **Provider** role):


**Email:**
